Phase-55.NAME: Premium Matrix Art Direction
Phase-55.objective: Define the premium KrotPN Matrix/cyberpunk visual direction before changing route layouts.
Phase-55.non-goals: Backend API changes, deploy/install changes, auth/session changes, VPN/MTProto/billing runtime changes.

step-1.action: Audit current user/admin Matrix tokens, layout density, colors, shadows, radii, and type usage.
step-1.acceptance: User/admin CSS contracts and current Matrix shell primitives were reviewed before edits.

step-2.action: Define premium palette with controlled Matrix green plus cyan, magenta, amber, red, neutral, and deep black.
step-2.acceptance: Shared premium palette tokens now exist in user/admin CSS and Phase-55 smoke rejects one-note or prohibited palette drift.

step-3.action: Define compact typography scale for display, UI, KPI, terminal/data, and email-adjacent surfaces.
step-3.acceptance: Shared premium type variables cover display, UI, KPI, and data surfaces without viewport-width font scaling or negative letter spacing.

step-4.action: Define logo usage rules using prepared assets from /home/truffle/Загрузки/ДЛЯ КРОТА/logos.
step-4.acceptance: Phase-55 smoke validates prepared logo source sizes plus public favicon/email-logo assets and records logo sizing variables.

step-5.action: Define premium density rules that avoid bulky cards, nested panels, and decorative clutter.
step-5.acceptance: Shared density/radius/shadow variables preserve compact panels and smoke rejects oversized radii, decorative orbs, radial backgrounds, and large hero/card drift.

step-6.action: Design reduced-motion and low-performance fallbacks for premium visual effects.
step-6.acceptance: Reduced-motion rules simplify scanline/grid effects and screenshot proof confirms readable static Matrix identity.

step-7.action: Create Phase-55 smoke requirements for palette, density, focus-visible, reduced-motion, and protected surface guards.
step-7.acceptance: scripts/phase55-premium-art-direction-smoke.mjs validates static tokens, logo assets, screenshot PNG artifacts, and protected deploy/install guard.

step-8.acceptance: M-072, V-M-072, M-071, indexes, and current-status record pass-local Phase-55 evidence.

execution-evidence.command-4: Chrome headless screenshots for user /login at 360x740, 390x844, 430x932, 768x1024; admin /login at 1024x768 and 1440x900; user/admin reduced-motion 390x844.
execution-evidence.result: PASS: shared premium tokens, balanced palette, compact density, logo rules, reduced-motion policy, screenshot artifact validation, XML/MyGRACE/diff checks, and protected deploy/install guards passed locally.
execution-evidence.protected-surface: No install.sh, deploy, nginx, docker-compose.yml, deploy/mtproto-de-compose.yml, .env.example, backend API, auth/session, VPN, MTProto, or billing runtime changes.

Phase-55.acceptance: Premium direction is ready for Phase-56/57/58 execution and does not change runtime behavior.
